raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee Gluhnetaji fehdeja
pee tahs kahdá Kambari/ un wiꞥ-
na fazzija us to: Tee Wihlisteri
nahk pahr tew Simsans. Tad fa-
raustija wiꞥsch tahs Wirwes/ itt
ka Pakkulu Patwedens tohp fa-
raustihts pee Ugguns aptwilli-
nahts/ un wiꞥza Spehks ne tap-
pe finnams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Delila us
Simsanu: Reds/ tu effi mann
peewihlis/ un man mellojis. Nu
jelle/ stahsti man/ luhdsams/ar ko
tew warr faistiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch fazzija us to:
Ja tee mann faistitu ar jaunahm
Wirwehm/ ar ko ne kahds Darbs
irr darrihts/ tad taptu es bes-
spehzigs/ un buhtu ka zits Zil-
weks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nehme Delila jaunas
Wirwes/ un farstija to ar teem/
un fazzija us to: Tee Wihlisteri
nahk pahr tew Simsans/ bet tee
Gluhnetaji fehdeja kahdá Kam-
bari/ tad faraustija wiꞥsch tahs
tahs no tawahm Rohkahm itt ka Pa-
wedenu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Delila us
Simsanu: Lihds schini effi tu
mann peewihlis/ un man mello-
jis/ stahsti man ar ko reu warr
fatstiht? Un wiꞥsch fazzija us to:
Ja tu mannasfeptis Mattu-Bi-
ses ap weenu Reestawu tihtn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥza peekalle (tohs
Reestawa) ar weenu Nagli/un
fazzija us to: Tee Wihlisteri
nahk pahr tew Simsans / un
wiꞥsch usmohdahs no fawa Mee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ga/ un iſtwilke to apwihtu Na-
li / un to Reestawu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija wiꞥza us ta-
ka warri tu fazziht: es mihle-
tew/ kur tomehr tawa Sirde
mannim ne irr? tu effi nu tri-
reisi mann peewihlis/ un ne sta-
stijs/eeksch ka tawsSpehks stah-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥza to ikdeen-
ar fuwahm Runnaschanah-
mahze / un gruhti darrija / ta-
apnikke wiꞥza Dwehfele lihds pa-
Nahwei.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas stahstijs winn-
wishu tawu Sirde/ un fazzija u-
wishu: Us mann Galwu ne i-
Dsennannajs Nasis nahzis/ jo-
etmu weens Deewa Nazareer-
no Mahtes Meeſahm/ kad (ma-
ni Matti ) nodshti taptu/ ta-
atstahtu mans Spehks no ma-
nim / un es taptu besspehzigs-
un buhtu itt ka wishi zitti Zi-
weki..
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Delila redseja/
tas winnai wishu fawn Sirde b-
stahstijs/tad nosuhtijs winna/u-
tafauze to Wihlisteru Leelus-Ku-
gus / fazzidama: Nahzeet we-
scho Brihdi augſcham/ jo win-
irr man wishu fawn Sirde sta-
stijs/ tad nahze to Wihlisteru Lee-
li-Kungi pee winnas augſcham-
un atneffe to Sudrabu fawn
Rohka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad likke winna fatw-
klehpi to ausleht / un aizina-
weenu Wihru/ un likke tam win-
na Galwas feptinas Mattu Bise-
nodsht/ un fahze winnu speez-
u
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
